reviews.review_description: It's pretty fun, I'll admit. Definitely add more characters. And I think there should be a mode where you just relax instead of speed dating, The characters are very chaotic. And that you can choose who to date for sure, getting a dude as a straight dude is pretty awkward. And that girl in the red dress at the front desk? I NEED THAT. RIGHT NOW. Besides that, pretty cool. Definitely keep the 10k or whateva it is amount of money instead of having to grind. And oh yeah, keep Norm and his camera in the game. No questions, please.
This game is so bad and a waste of money and i need my money back
Dont get the game there is only 6 people and it is not worth it, they dont even do that much unique stuff to be worth it terrible game

reviews.review_title: Where's the Blue Hair Ponytail Girl?
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome, but i specifically bought it because i liked watching youtubers date the blue hair girl with ponytails, and the blonde one that shares the same voice. Where are they? I'm only getting 6 characters and i have all 6 max heart. Otherwise love this one.

developer_response.body: Hi there! With recent update, new characters with different personalities were added, for now old ones were removed. New characters have specific prefernces and are more diverse. But we'll keep your feedback in mind, ty!

reviews.review_description: I WANNA DATE THE GIRL IN THE LOBBY SHE SUCH A BADDIE FR 🤪🤪🤪
Nice game

reviews.review_title: Great But Doing Funny Stuff Ends Date
reviews.review_description: The game is great but doing romantic stuff is limited to mostly buying her stuff to impress her, there isn't much else( hold hands, kiss, caress cheeks or any part) that will get her to react. And if you want to do stuff funny stuff to her( shoot her with paint etc) you can't do it endlessly because she will reach her limit of anger and leave. Since most likely you won't add more romantic reactions(but even if you did), can you make an endless mode where you can endlessly have fun with the funny props and guns, pull her around by the hand, head, etc and that she won't just leave? Oh and can you add random outfits once you choose the girl. One gets boring. Like 1 out of a selection of like 5 or 10

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for taking your time and leaving us detailed feedback and suggestions. The game is currently in early access and more features to be added. We noted your thoughts, and if you want to share more or just chat with the community we'll be happy to see you in our Discord discord.hypervr.games

reviews.review_description: I just purchased the game and there are only 2 rounds available(6 dates in total). That’s it!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
Each date has a different personality and gameplay approach, so even within the current selection, every interaction is designed to feel distinct. The game is also in Early Access, meaning content is still evolving and subject to change as development continues.

We appreciate you giving it a try and sharing your experience 💙

reviews.review_description: Yall need more characters and more places after a while it gets boring and it’s a fun vr concept

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback — we’re glad you’re enjoying the concept!
We appreciate you sharing your thoughts, and if you’d like to leave more ideas or stay connected, feel free to join our Discord 💙discord.hypervr.games

developer_response.body: Hi there! Hair color is a matter of preference, of course. We're sorry to hear that this one wasn't your cup of tea. Further in the game you can unlock more chracaters + we're planning to add more content soon. Please, stay tuned, and we hope your opinion will change!

Fun game the characters could use more dialogue. They repeat the same talking points.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks for taking time and leaving us a nice review. My Perfect Date is an early access game and we intend to add more stuff in the future. Your feedback is very useful and helps us with the development process. If you have more suggestions or just want to chat, feel free to jump to our Discord discord.hypervr.games
